title: Student Assistant (Hilfskraft)
points: Grading weekly exercise sheets for the Numerical Optimization lecture (Prof. Dr. Volker Schulz) during the summer semester 2026.
Reviewing student work on unconstrained and constrained optimisation, line-search and trust-region methods, KKT conditions, and numerical linear algebra for optimisation, with written feedback.

title: Software Developer
points: Designed a rule-based content-matching framework for eInvoices, reducing country-specific implementation efforts by 70%.

Developed a pagination-based data retrieval algorithm that improved system efficiency by reducing SAP queries from processing 10,000 eInvoices per request to all eInvoices in a single request, cutting report generation time by 30%.
Designed the ML-driven document-consistency-check result processing framework and ideated a self-correcting error-analysis ML system on top of it.

title: Associate Software Developer
points: Led critical legal and feature updates for Document Compliance tax solutions from design to development.
Overhauled error-handling in the SAP DRC solution for Turkey, reducing customer incidents by 80% and improving customer satisfaction by 66%.
Spearheaded the integration of Data Protection and Privacy (DPP) protocols into the SAP Document Consistency solution to ensure secure data handling and compliance.
